chapter_title.ar: باب ضَمَانِ الْجَمَّالِ وَ الْمُكَارِي وَ أَصْحَابِ السُّفُنِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 113 – The liability of the cameleer, and the hirer (of animals), and the owners of the ships

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/299)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/299)
text: رَجُلٍ حَمَلَ مَعَ رَجُلٍ فِي سَفِينَةٍ طَعَاماً فَنَقَصَ قَالَ هُوَ ضَامِنٌ قُلْتُ إِنَّهُ رُبَّمَا زَادَ قَالَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّهُ زَادَ شَيْئاً قُلْتُ لَا قَالَ هُوَ لَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who carried a man with foodstuff along with him in a ship, and it was deficient (upon arrival). He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He is liable’. I said, ‘Sometimes it turns out to be excessive’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do you know that anything had increased?’ I said, ‘No’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is for you’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “In the case of a man who carries foodstuff in the ship and it is reduced, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, has said, ‘He is liable.’ I then asked, ‘What if it is increased?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Do you know it is increased?’ I replied, ‘No, I do not know.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘It is for you.’”
